```sql
-- Generated by the database client.
CREATE TABLE vehicle_data(
    unique_id varchar(500) NOT NULL,
    vehicle_id varchar(255) NOT NULL,
    data_source varchar(255) NOT NULL,
    listing_url text NOT NULL,
    images json,
    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    scraped_at date NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE,
    updated_at date NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE,
    is_vehicle_available boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
    title text,
    price text,
    make text,
    model text,
    model_version text,
    model_range text,
    price_info text,
    subtitle text,
    price_label text,
    trim_line text,

    category text,
    body_type text,
    make_id text,
    model_id text,

    sku text,
    hsn_tsn text,
    identifier text,
    power_kw text,
    power_hp text,
    power_display text,
    power_kw_display text,
    power_hp_display text,
    displacement_ccm text,
    displacement_display text,
    cylinders text,
    gears text,
    weight text,
    net_weight text,

CREATE INDEX idx_vehicle_data_vehicle_id ON vehicle_marketplace.vehicle_data USING btree (vehicle_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_vehicle_data_data_source ON vehicle_marketplace.vehicle_data USING btree (data_source);
CREATE INDEX idx_vehicle_data_created_at ON vehicle_marketplace.vehicle_data USING btree (created_at);
CREATE INDEX idx_vehicle_data_updated_at ON vehicle_marketplace.vehicle_data USING btree (updated_at);
CREATE INDEX idx_vehicle_data_scraped_at ON vehicle_marketplace.vehicle_data USING btree (scraped_at);
CREATE INDEX idx_vehicle_data_is_vehicle_available ON vehicle_marketplace.vehicle_data USING btree (is_vehicle_available);
CREATE INDEX idx_vehicle_data_listing_url ON vehicle_marketplace.vehicle_data USING btree (listing_url);
```
